allow: Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', d => chunks.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const data = Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\); const lines = data.trim\(\).split\('\\n'\); lines.slice\(-20\).forEach\(line => { try { const obj = JSON.parse\(line\); if \(obj.type === 'assistant'\) { const content = obj.message?.content || []; content.forEach\(c => { if \(c.type === 'text'\) console.log\('ASSISTANT:', c.text.slice\(0, 500\)\); }\); } else if \(obj.type === 'user'\) { const content = obj.message?.content || []; content.forEach\(c => { if \(c.type === 'text'\) console.log\('USER:', c.text.slice\(0, 200\)\); }\); } } catch\(e\) {} }\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', d => chunks.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const data = Buffer.concat\(chunks\).toString\(\); const lines = data.trim\(\).split\('\\n'\); lines.forEach\(\(line, i\) => { try { const obj = JSON.parse\(line\); if \(obj.type === 'assistant'\) { const content = obj.message?.content || []; content.forEach\(c => { if \(c.type === 'text'\) console.log\('ASSISTANT:', c.text.slice\(0, 800\)\); if \(c.type === 'tool_use'\) console.log\('TOOL_USE:', c.name, JSON.stringify\(c.input\).slice\(0, 300\)\); }\); } else if \(obj.type === 'user'\) { const content = obj.message?.content || []; content.forEach\(c => { if \(c.type === 'text'\) console.log\('USER:', c.text.slice\(0, 400\)\); if \(c.type === 'tool_result'\) { const rc = c.content; if \(Array.isArray\(rc\)\) rc.forEach\(r => { if \(r.type==='text'\) console.log\('TOOL_RESULT:', r.text.slice\(0,300\)\); }\); } }\); } } catch\(e\) {} }\); }\); ")
